selected_strategy.doctrine: Use typed deltas where the corpus already names them; otherwise prefer receipt-driven snapshot refresh over client-composed legal posture.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Clients apply typed deltas and may preserve local focus only; they may not derive fresh legal meaning from the stream alone.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Duplicate deltas are idempotent by sequence and publication generation.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Clients preserve filters and scroll anchors but do not reconstruct queue truth from mounted workspaces.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Duplicate delivery is idempotent by monotonic sequence.
stream_contracts.rebuild_source: Workflow truth and append-only notification history.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Clients preserve the active module and draft context, but do not synthesize assignment, escalation, or hidden-lane state.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Workspace deltas are idempotent by sequence and route guard spine.
stream_contracts.rebuild_source: Workflow truth plus append-only collaboration artifacts.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Clients may page older entries and switch lanes only when the server returns the matching visibility-scoped slice.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Paged support slices rebase to the mounted workspace snapshot rather than applying opaque local patch sets.
stream_contracts.rebuild_source: Append-only collaboration entries and attachments plus mounted workspace truth.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Portal clients never infer stronger certainty or hidden staff posture from refresh timing or badge changes.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Portal refresh replaces the mounted route projection only when the view guard and visibility partition still match.
stream_contracts.primary_snapshot: ClientPortalWorkspace and route-local customer-safe read models
stream_contracts.rebuild_source: Durable workflow, obligation, authority, and receipt truth through the customer-safe boundary.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Governance clients may preserve local filters and change baskets, but not derive authoritative policy state from mutated local fragments.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Equivalent basis hashes dedupe refreshes; changed basis hashes force a new snapshot.
stream_contracts.rebuild_source: Durable governance truth, audit ledgers, and simulation basis snapshots.

stream_contracts.client_rule: Native caches are disposable mirrors only and must purge on revocation, tenant switch, masking drift, or incompatible schema.
stream_contracts.duplicate_handling: Native delta application is idempotent; incompatible cache or guard drift triggers full rehydrate.
stream_contracts.rebuild_source: Northbound snapshots and typed deltas sourced from durable truth.

source_refs: Algorithm/collaboration_workspace_contract.md::2. Screen map[The explicit focus-jump form is named here.]
Algorithm/frontend_shell_and_interaction_law.md::2. Route continuity and shell stability[Focus jumps still obey shell stability law.]
typed_gaps.summary: The collaboration contract explicitly names `/manifests/{manifest_id}?focus=workflow:{item_id}`, but other manifest route literals are distributed across the corpus rather than centralized.
